text:
Characters that rapidly flash over Harkinian's face at 0:19 and specific games that are taken from are as follows:
Donkey Kong (Donkey Kong, 1983 NES)
Zero (Mega Man X2, 1994 SNES)
Bald Bull (Punch-Out!!, 1987 NES)
Balloon Fighter (Balloon Fight, 1984 NES)
Charizard (Pokémon Gold/Silver, 1999 GBC)
Sonic the Hedgehog (Sonic the Hedgehog, 1991 Mega Drive/Genesis)
Miles "Tails" Prower (Sonic the Hedgehog 2, 1992 Mega Drive/Genesis)
Knuckles the Echidna (Sonic the Hedgehog 3 & Knuckles, 1994 Mega Drive/Genesis)
Kirby (Kirby Super Star, 1996 SNES)
X w/ all armor upgrades (Mega Man X2, 1994 SNES)
Neo Met (Mega Man 2, 1988 NES)
Amy Rose (Sonic CD, 1993 Sega CD)
Dog (Duck Hunt, 1984 NES)
Donkey Kong (Donkey Kong Country, 1994 SNES)
Sailor Moon (Quiz!! Bishōjo Senshi Sailor Moon: Chiryoku, Tairyoku, Toki no Un, 1997 arcade)
Goku (Dragon Ball Z: Hyper Dimension, 1996 SNES)
Referee Mario (Punch-Out!!, 1987 NES)
Yoshi and Baby Mario (Super Mario World 2: Yoshi's Island, 1995 SNES)
Dr. Robotnik (Sonic the Hedgehog 3 & Knuckles, 1994 Mega Drive/Genesis)
SMB3 Luigi (Super Mario All-Stars, 1993 SNES)
